    print('missing',p)

    terms=['venezuela','maduro','armada','yemen','ukraine','zelensk','budanov','morocco','afcon','crans','grok','joshua','fury','iran protest','lorestan','starlink','gaza','israel','somalia','minnesota','immigration','greenland','chelsea','manchester united']

        if any(t in title.lower() for t in terms):
            titles.append((a.get('date_publish'),a.get('source'),title))
    print('article_count',n)
    print('top_sources',c.most_common(14))
    for date,source,title in titles[:180]:
        print(date, source, '|', title)
